javadoc_before:
/** * Sets the {@link SourceCache} used by this {@link DocValues} instance. This * method should be called before {@link #load()} or * {@link #loadSorted(Comparator)} is called. All {@link Source} or * {@link SortedSource} instances in the currently used cache will be closed * before the new cache is installed. *

* Note: All instances previously obtained from {@link #load()} or * {@link #loadSorted(Comparator)} will be closed. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Sets the {@link SourceCache} used by this {@link DocValues} instance. This * method should be called before {@link #load()} or * {@link #loadSorted(Comparator)} is called. All {@link Source} or * {@link SortedSource} instances in the currently used cache will be closed * before the new cache is installed. *

* Note: All instances previously obtained from {@link #load()} or * {@link #loadSorted(Comparator)} will be closed. * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the given cache is null * */
